# GitHub Copilot Instructions

- Project: Next.js App Router, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS.
- Follow `/AGENTS.md`.
- Keep the UI light with sky/cyan accents.
- Never expose credentials or private teacher fields.
- Teacher APIs may return only name, code, and center.
- Preserve the reduced navigation defined in `app/components/Sidebar.tsx`.
- Validate with `npm run lint` and `npm run build`.
